title: LifeSmart CV Dimming Controller LS265
description:
Work with Smart station, Support 12V~48V constant voltage input, can control constant voltage strip light, magnetic track light, spot light, etc. at the same time. • 10,000-point dimming depth, no video flicker, silky smooth dimming effect. • Multiple pairing methods for easy installation. • Customize the gamma dimming curve, dimming time, adjust the dimming curve more in line with the human eye vision.
Adapter: DC12-48V | Packaging: Chinese | EAN: 6932046205641 | HS code: 854370999 | Package size: 8.8*3.8*2.2 | Weight: 0.068 kg
availability: Catalogue price list / availability under review
